type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Emissions are estimated based on acid scrubber operating hours.  There was a 37% increase in total operating hours for the acid scrubbers from 2014 to 2015, reflecting increased throughput for metal cleaning line.
Partial diversion to recycling.
Reflects increased throughput tonnage for the metal cleaning line (36% increase from 2014 to 2015) and diversion from disposal to recycling.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Correction to reporting categories. Discharges to sewer water were previously reported as releases to water bodies (incorrectly). These discharges will now be reported under off-site transfers for treatment prior to final disposal.

Lead ash, which contains approximately 2.75% lead, was diverted from disposal to recycling in 2015. Discharges to sanitary and storm sewers were previously reported as releases to water bodies, but have been reported as off-site transfers for treatment prior to final disposal this year.
Lead ash, which contains approximately 2.75% lead, was diverted from disposal to recycling in 2015.
Large increase in quantity of Desmut residue disposal in 2015. From 0 kg in 2014 to 63,360 kg in 2015. This residue is estimated to contain approximately 17% manganese.
Lead ash to diverted from disposal to off-site recycling contains approximately 0.13% manganese.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reflects increased operating time of Oil Tempering Lines as well as a correction to accounting methodologies for the emissions from the Oil Tempering Lines.
Large increase in quantity of Desmut residue disposal in 2015. From 0 kg in 2014 to 63,360 kg in 2015. This residue is estimated to contain approximately 1.2% zinc.
Lead ash diverted from disposal to off-site recycling contains approximately 0.0053% zinc.
